Webpack loader for restricted resource loading and a Python template for generating webpack configurations.


## Files
- **[restricted-resource-loader.js](restricted-resource-loader.js.md)**: Webpack loader that restricts resource loading to whitelisted project and SDK paths.
- **[webpack-config.js.pytemplate](webpack-config.js.pytemplate.md)**: A Python template for generating a webpack configuration with customizable entry points, output, and plugins.
